center.name: 森林退化
center.summary: 森林退化是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Moustached brushfinch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northern Colombia, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest and heavily degraded former forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in northern Colombia, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest and heavily degraded former forest
